enabled_events.name: SessionStart
enabled_events.notes: Use this for lightweight bootstrap context, runtime checks, or repo reminders.

enabled_events.name: PreToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Use this for Bash guardrails only. Do not assume `Write` or `MCP` interception.

enabled_events.name: PostToolUse
enabled_events.notes: Use this for post-command notes, quick validation, or lightweight follow-up checks.

enabled_events.name: UserPromptSubmit
enabled_events.notes: Use this to add extra developer context or ask for clearer prompts when needed.

enabled_events.name: Stop
enabled_events.notes: Use this for one more Codex pass, final checks, or concise completion reminders.
